---
title:  
    "Parallel evolution of EXPIII"
date: 
    "June 30th, 2024"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

# loading libraries
library("ggplot2")
library("ggpubr")
library("plotly")
library("reshape2")
library("ggvenn")
library("hrbrthemes")
library("DT")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("Biostrings")
library("stringr")
library("magrittr")
library("rstatix")


```


```{r read-in the data}

# determine the server path

if (file.exists("/home/amovas/")){
  print("Remote HPC Connection!")
  wd <- "/home/amovas/data/genome-evo-proj/"
} else {
  print("Local PC Connection!")
  wd <- "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/"
}

# load data
variants_ann <- read.table(file = paste0(wd, "results/tables/pipeline-outputs/all_annotated_variants.tsv.gz"), 
sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)


# correct for the switched experimental lines
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 15 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "A"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 16 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "B"

variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "A"] <- "16"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "B"] <- "15"


# only keep the EXPIII data
exp <- "EXPIII"
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann[variants_ann$exp_line %in% 13:16,]


# facors

host_factor <- c("MT2", "MT4")
exp_line_factor <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")

translational_impacts <- c("U", "S", "N")
gene_factor <- c("gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat", "rev", "vpu", "envelope", "nef")
feature_factor <- c("5utr", "gag", "pol", "vif", "vpr", "tat1", "rev1", "vpu", "envelope", "tat2", "rev2", "nef", "3utr")

# format the dataframe
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>%
                            mutate(host_line = ifelse(exp_line %in% c("13", "14"), "MT2", "MT4"), # set host cell line info
                            exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "MT-2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "MT-2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "MT-4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "MT-4_2"), # update exp line labels
                            mut_info = paste(genomic_pos, ref_allele, alt_allele, sep = "_")) %>% 
                            mutate(effect_simplified = case_when(effect == "synonymous_variant" ~ "S", effect == "untranslated_region" ~ "U")) %>%
                            mutate(effect_simplified = replace_na(effect_simplified, "N")) %>%
                            mutate(passage = as.factor(passage),
                            exp_line = factor(exp_line, levels = exp_line_factor),
                            host_line = factor(host_line, levels = host_factor),
                            effect_simplified = factor(effect_simplified, levels = translational_impacts)) 

# remove duplicate records for the same variants
variants_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>% filter(!duplicated(variant_id))


# last passage 

end_passage <- 560


# Visual settings

line_palette <- c("#ff00ff", "#ff2400", "#6600cc", "#0000ff")
breaks_step <- 50
line_labels <- c("MT-2_1", "MT-2_2", "MT-4_1", "MT-4_2")


```





```{r set parameters}

# set parameters
category <- "Fixed"

if (category == "Sporadic"){
    min_threshold <- 0.01
    max_threshold <- 0.05
} else if (category == "Minority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.05
    max_threshold <- 0.5
} else if (category == "Majority"){
    min_threshold <- 0.5
    max_threshold <- 1.01
} else if (category == "Fixed"){
    min_threshold <- 0.99
    max_threshold <- 1.01
}

```


```{r venn diagram}

end_passage <- 560

end_fixed <- 
        variants_expiii %>%
        filter(allele_freq >= min_threshold, allele_freq < max_threshold, passage == end_passage) %>%
        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
        distinct()



#table(as.numeric(table(par$mut_info)))


# create a named vector from the df
muts <- end_fixed$mut_info
names(muts) <- end_fixed$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts_list <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


# visualization
fig <- ggvenn(muts_list) +
        labs(title = paste0(category, " Mutations at passage #", end_passage))+
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        plot.margin = unit(c(1,1,1,1), "cm"))


# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "parallel_venn.pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()

```


```{r parallelism simulations}

effect <- c("S", "N", "U")
names(effect) <- rep("All", length(effect))

# Nr of unique mutations with af >= 0.1
variants_expiii$passage <- as.integer(as.character(variants_expiii$passage))
variants_expiii$effect_simplified <- as.character(variants_expiii$effect_simplified)

# filter for relevant mutations
variants_expiii_sub <- variants_expiii[variants_expiii$effect_simplified %in% effect & variants_expiii$mut_type == "P",]




df <- data.frame()


for (line1 in exp_line_factor){
    for (line2 in exp_line_factor){
        exp_all <- data.frame()
        for (base in c("A", "C", "G", "T")){
            variants_expiii_sub2 <- variants_expiii_sub[variants_expiii_sub$ref_allele == base,]
            a <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.01 & variants_expiii_sub2$exp_line %in% c(line1) & variants_expiii_sub2$passage <= end_passage-100]))
            aa <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.01 & variants_expiii_sub2$exp_line %in% c(line2) & variants_expiii_sub2$passage <= end_passage-100]))
            b <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub2$exp_line %in% c(line1) & variants_expiii_sub2$passage == end_passage]))
            bb <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub2$exp_line %in% c(line2) & variants_expiii_sub2$passage == end_passage]))
            
            c <- length(intersect(variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.01 & variants_expiii_sub2$exp_line %in% c(line1) & variants_expiii_sub2$passage <= end_passage-100],variants_expiii_sub2$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub2$allele_freq >= 0.01 & variants_expiii_sub2$exp_line %in% c(line2) & variants_expiii_sub2$passage <= end_passage-100]))
            

            i <- 0
            exp_base <- integer()
            while (i <= 1000){
                i <- i + 1
                j <- sample(1:a, size = b, replace = F)
                k <- sample(1:aa, size = bb, replace = F)
                exp_base <- c(exp_base,sum(intersect(j,k)<=c))
            }

            exp_all <- rbind(exp_all, exp_base)
        }
        
        exp_shared <- colSums(exp_all)
        obs_all <- length(unique(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line1,line2) & variants_expiii_sub$passage == end_passage]))
        obs_shared <- length(intersect(variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line1) & variants_expiii_sub$passage == end_passage],variants_expiii_sub$mut_info[variants_expiii_sub$allele_freq >= 0.99 & variants_expiii_sub$exp_line %in% c(line2) & variants_expiii_sub$passage == end_passage]))
        
        # Calculate mean and standard deviation
        mean_data <- mean(exp_shared)
        sd_data <- sd(exp_shared)
        # Calculate the z-score
        z_score <- (obs_shared - mean_data) / sd_data
        # Calculate the p-value
        p_value <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(z_score)))
        df <- rbind(df,c(line1,line2,obs_all,obs_shared,obs_shared/obs_all,mean_data/obs_all,p_value))
    }
}

df %<>% set_colnames(c("Var1", "Var2", "total_unique", "shared", "%shared", "expected_%shared", "p.val"))


```


```{r parallelism visualization}




# uniqueness of majority mutations observed at the end of experiment
end_fixed <- variants_expiii_sub %>%
                        filter(allele_freq >= min_threshold, allele_freq < max_threshold, passage == end_passage) %>%
                        select(c(exp_line,mut_info)) %>%
                        distinct()




# create a named vector from the df
muts <- end_fixed$mut_info
names(muts) <- end_fixed$exp_line

# convert named vector to list
muts_list <- lapply(split(muts, names(muts)), unname)


shared_percent <- c()


for (i in 1:4){
        dd <- muts_list[[i]]
        for (j in 1:4){
            if (i<=j){
                shared_percent <- append(shared_percent,100*(sum(dd %in% muts_list[[j]])/(length(muts_list[[i]])+length(muts_list[[j]])-sum(dd %in% muts_list[[j]]))))
            } else {shared_percent <- append(shared_percent,NA)}
        }
        
}


shared_mat <- matrix(shared_percent, ncol = 4)
row.names(shared_mat) <- exp_line_factor
colnames(shared_mat) <- exp_line_factor

shared_df <- as.data.frame(shared_mat) %>% 
                        `colnames<-`(names(muts_list)) %>%
                        mutate(line1 = names(muts_list)) %>%
                        mutate(line1 = factor(line1, levels = exp_line_factor)) %>%
                        gather(key = "line2", value = "val", 1:4) %>%
                        mutate(line2 = factor(line2, levels = exp_line_factor)) %>%
                        mutate(val = round(val, 2))



melted_cormat <- melt(shared_mat, na.rm = TRUE)

melted_cormat$value <- round(melted_cormat$value, digits = 1)

# merge simulation data


melted_cormat <- merge(melted_cormat, df[,c(1,2,6)], by = c("Var1", "Var2"))
melted_cormat$`expected_%shared` <- round(as.numeric(melted_cormat$`expected_%shared`)*100, digits = 1)
melted_cormat$`expected_%shared`[melted_cormat$val == 100] <- 100


fig <- ggplot(data = as.data.frame(melted_cormat), aes(x=Var1, y=Var2, fill=value)) + 
        geom_tile(color = "white") +
        geom_text(aes(Var1, Var2, label = paste0(value, "(", `expected_%shared`,")")), color = "black", size = 13) +
        labs(title = paste0("Fixed ", names(effect)[1], " Mutation Parallelism at Passage #", end_passage)) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(low = "white", high = "red", 
        midpoint = 1, limit = c(0,100), space = "Lab", 
        name="Shared %") +
        theme_minimal()+ 
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 40, hjust = 0.5),
            axis.title = element_blank(),
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 30, angle = 90),
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 30),
            legend.title = element_text(size=35),
            legend.text = element_text(size = 25)) +
        coord_fixed()

ggplotly(fig)

# save figure
date <- str_split(Sys.time(), pattern = " ")[[1]][1]
fig_dir <- paste0(wd, "results/figs/publication/expiii/provisional/", date, "/")
ifelse(!dir.exists(file.path(fig_dir)), dir.create(file.path(fig_dir)), FALSE)
pdf(file = paste0(fig_dir, "parallel_heatmap_", names(effect)[1],".pdf"), height = 14, width = 14)
fig
dev.off()


```

```{r}


# Do we see less parallelism in synonymous mutations?


```
